tests.description: Outer guard wraps a fork. With the shared-guard model (cloneForBranch returns this), the OUTER CostGuard is a single in-memory object shared across all branches. The first branch's post-call check trips OUTER mid-fork before the fork settles — the trailing llm('after') is unreachable. Regression for real-time mid-fork enforcement. Under the prior per-branch-clone model the trip only fired post-join via the trailing 'after' call.
